ksa_text: Manage ongoing data and AI program operations, including monitoring execution schedules, coordinating responses to operational issues, automating routine operations, and capacity planning for anticipated resource needs.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-002 (Operations & Program Management/Task) excluded: out_of_scope: 1 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.434. Highest framework: O*NET at 0.434.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope scope, Operations & Program Management, composite 0.434. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Operations & Program Management (composite 0.434)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Operations & Program Management at ~8% market presence. Organizational program management not in ATE job descriptions. Exclusion consistent with role-level scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
